name: Macbee Planet, Inc.
summary: Macbee Planet,Inc. engages in analytics consulting business in Japan. The company is involved in marketing analysis activities, which builds LTV prediction models by analyzing and visualizing purchasing data to derive optimal marketing methods; and the marketing technology business that offers sales and operation support for in-house developed products utilizing data and technology. Its products include Robee web customer service tool and Honeycomb data analysis platform. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
